members.name: _GetAabb
members.summary: Virtual method to override the [AABB] for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _GetBlendShapeCount
members.summary: Virtual method to override the number of blend shapes for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _GetBlendShapeName
members.summary: Virtual method to override the retrieval of blend shape names for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _GetSurfaceCount
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface count for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SetBlendShapeName
members.summary: Virtual method to override the names of blend shapes for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetArrayIndexLen
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface array index length for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetArrayLen
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface array length for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetArrays
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface arrays for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetBlendShapeArrays
members.summary: Virtual method to override the blend shape arrays for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetFormat
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface format for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetLods
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface LODs for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetMaterial
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface material for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceGetPrimitiveType
members.summary: Virtual method to override the surface primitive type for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: _SurfaceSetMaterial
members.summary: Virtual method to override the setting of a [param material] at the given [param index] for a custom class extending [Mesh].

members.name: CreateConvexShape
members.signature: public ConvexPolygonShape3D CreateConvexShape(bool clean, bool simplify)
members.summary: Calculate a [ConvexPolygonShape3D] from the mesh. If [param clean] is [code]true[/code] (default), duplicate and interior vertices are removed automatically. You can set it to [code]false[/code] to make the process faster if not needed. If [param simplify] is [code]true[/code], the geometry can be further simplified to reduce the number of vertices. Disabled by default.

members.name: CreateOutline
members.summary: Calculate an outline mesh at a defined offset (margin) from the original mesh. [b]Note:[/b] This method typically returns the vertices in reverse order (e.g. clockwise to counterclockwise).

members.name: CreatePlaceholder
members.summary: Creates a placeholder version of this resource ([PlaceholderMesh]).

members.name: CreateTrimeshShape
members.summary: Calculate a [ConcavePolygonShape3D] from the mesh.

members.name: GenerateTriangleMesh
members.summary: Generate a [TriangleMesh] from the mesh. Considers only surfaces using one of these primitive types: [constant PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES], [constant PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLE_STRIP].

members.name: GetAabb
members.summary: Returns the smallest [AABB] enclosing this mesh in local space. Not affected by [code]custom_aabb[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] This is only implemented for [ArrayMesh] and [PrimitiveMesh].

members.name: GetFaces
members.summary: Returns all the vertices that make up the faces of the mesh. Each three vertices represent one triangle.

members.name: GetSurfaceCount
members.summary: Returns the number of surfaces that the [Mesh] holds. This is equivalent to [method MeshInstance3D.get_surface_override_material_count].

members.name: SurfaceGetArrays
members.summary: Returns the arrays for the vertices, normals, UVs, etc. that make up the requested surface (see [method ArrayMesh.add_surface_from_arrays]).

members.name: SurfaceGetBlendShapeArrays
members.summary: Returns the blend shape arrays for the requested surface.

members.name: SurfaceGetMaterial
members.summary: Returns a [Material] in a given surface. Surface is rendered using this material. [b]Note:[/b] This returns the material within the [Mesh] resource, not the [Material] associated to the [MeshInstance3D]'s Surface Material Override properties. To get the [Material] associated to the [MeshInstance3D]'s Surface Material Override properties, use [method MeshInstance3D.get_surface_override_material] instead.

members.name: SurfaceSetMaterial
members.signature: public void SurfaceSetMaterial(int surfIdx, Material material)
members.summary: Sets a [Material] for a given surface. Surface will be rendered using this material. [b]Note:[/b] This assigns the material within the [Mesh] resource, not the [Material] associated to the [MeshInstance3D]'s Surface Material Override properties. To set the [Material] associated to the [MeshInstance3D]'s Surface Material Override properties, use [method MeshInstance3D.set_surface_override_material] instead.

members.name: LightmapSizeHint
members.summary: Sets a hint to be used for lightmap resolution.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ArrayCustomFormat] enum.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains signed normalized byte colors from -1 to 1, encoded as [PackedByteArray].

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains unsigned normalized byte colors from 0 to 1, encoded as [PackedByteArray].

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_FLOAT
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array].

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains half precision float colors, encoded as [PackedByteArray].

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGB_FLOAT
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array]. Only red, green and blue channels are used.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_FLOAT
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array]. Only red and green channels are used.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains half precision float colors, encoded as [PackedByteArray]. Only red and green channels are used.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_R_FLOAT
values.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array]. Only the red channel is used.

values.name: ARRAY_COMPRESS_FLAGS_BASE
values.summary: Shift of first compress flag. Compress flags should be passed to [method ArrayMesh.add_surface_from_arrays] and [method SurfaceTool.commit].

values.name: ARRAY_FLAG_COMPRESS_ATTRIBUTES
values.summary: Flag used to mark that a mesh is using compressed attributes (vertices, normals, tangents, UVs). When this form of compression is enabled, vertex positions will be packed into an RGBA16UNORM attribute and scaled in the vertex shader. The normal and tangent will be packed into an RG16UNORM representing an axis, and a 16-bit float stored in the A-channel of the vertex. UVs will use 16-bit normalized floats instead of full 32-bit signed floats. When using this compression mode you must use either vertices, normals, and tangents or only vertices. You cannot use normals without tangents. Importers will automatically enable this compression if they can.

values.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USES_EMPTY_VERTEX_ARRAY
values.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh intentionally contains no vertex array.

values.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_2D_VERTICES
values.summary: Flag used to mark that the array contains 2D vertices.

values.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS
values.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh contains up to 8 bone influences per vertex. This flag indicates that [constant ARRAY_BONES] and [constant ARRAY_WEIGHTS] elements will have double length.

values.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_DYNAMIC_UPDATE
values.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh data will use [code]GL_DYNAMIC_DRAW[/code] on GLES. Unused on Vulkan.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_BLEND_SHAPE_MASK
values.summary: Mask of mesh channels permitted in blend shapes.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_BONES
values.summary: Mesh array contains bones.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_COLOR
values.summary: Mesh array contains colors.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM0
values.summary: Mesh array contains custom channel index 0.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM0_SHIFT
values.summary: Amount to shift [enum ArrayCustomFormat] for custom channel index 0.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM1
values.summary: Mesh array contains custom channel index 1.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM1_SHIFT
values.summary: Amount to shift [enum ArrayCustomFormat] for custom channel index 1.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM2
values.summary: Mesh array contains custom channel index 2.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM2_SHIFT
values.summary: Amount to shift [enum ArrayCustomFormat] for custom channel index 2.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM3
values.summary: Mesh array contains custom channel index 3.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM3_SHIFT
values.summary: Amount to shift [enum ArrayCustomFormat] for custom channel index 3.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_BASE
values.summary: Shift of first custom channel.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_BITS
values.summary: Number of format bits per custom channel. See [enum ArrayCustomFormat].

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK
values.summary: Mask of custom format bits per custom channel. Must be shifted by one of the SHIFT constants. See [enum ArrayCustomFormat].

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_INDEX
values.summary: Mesh array uses indices.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_NORMAL
values.summary: Mesh array contains normals.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_TANGENT
values.summary: Mesh array contains tangents.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_TEX_UV
values.summary: Mesh array contains UVs.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_TEX_UV2
values.summary: Mesh array contains second UV.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_VERTEX
values.summary: Mesh array contains vertices. All meshes require a vertex array so this should always be present.

values.name: ARRAY_FORMAT_WEIGHTS
values.summary: Mesh array contains bone weights.

values.name: ARRAY_BONES
values.summary: [PackedFloat32Array] or [PackedInt32Array] of bone indices. Contains either 4 or 8 numbers per vertex depending on the presence of the [constant ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS] flag.

values.name: ARRAY_COLOR
values.summary: [PackedColorArray] of vertex colors.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM0
values.summary: Contains custom color channel 0. [PackedByteArray] if [code](format >> Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM0_SHIFT) & Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK[/code] is [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF], or [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF]. [PackedFloat32Array] otherwise.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM1
values.summary: Contains custom color channel 1. [PackedByteArray] if [code](format >> Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM1_SHIFT) & Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK[/code] is [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF], or [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF]. [PackedFloat32Array] otherwise.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM2
values.summary: Contains custom color channel 2. [PackedByteArray] if [code](format >> Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM2_SHIFT) & Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK[/code] is [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF], or [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF]. [PackedFloat32Array] otherwise.

values.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM3
values.summary: Contains custom color channel 3. [PackedByteArray] if [code](format >> Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM3_SHIFT) & Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK[/code] is [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF], or [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF]. [PackedFloat32Array] otherwise.

values.name: ARRAY_INDEX
values.summary: [PackedInt32Array] of integers used as indices referencing vertices, colors, normals, tangents, and textures. All of those arrays must have the same number of elements as the vertex array. No index can be beyond the vertex array size. When this index array is present, it puts the function into "index mode," where the index selects the [i]i[/i]'th vertex, normal, tangent, color, UV, etc. This means if you want to have different normals or colors along an edge, you have to duplicate the vertices. For triangles, the index array is interpreted as triples, referring to the vertices of each triangle. For lines, the index array is in pairs indicating the start and end of each line.

values.name: ARRAY_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ArrayType] enum.

values.name: ARRAY_NORMAL
values.summary: [PackedVector3Array] of vertex normals. [b]Note:[/b] The array has to consist of normal vectors, otherwise they will be normalized by the engine, potentially causing visual discrepancies.

values.name: ARRAY_TANGENT
values.summary: [PackedFloat32Array] of vertex tangents. Each element in groups of 4 floats, first 3 floats determine the tangent, and the last the binormal direction as -1 or 1.

values.name: ARRAY_TEX_UV
values.summary: [PackedVector2Array] for UV coordinates.

values.name: ARRAY_TEX_UV2
values.summary: [PackedVector2Array] for second UV coordinates.

values.name: ARRAY_VERTEX
values.summary: [PackedVector3Array], [PackedVector2Array], or [Array] of vertex positions.

values.name: ARRAY_WEIGHTS
values.summary: [PackedFloat32Array] or [PackedFloat64Array] of bone weights in the range [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code] (inclusive). Contains either 4 or 8 numbers per vertex depending on the presence of the [constant ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS] flag.

values.name: BLEND_SHAPE_MODE_NORMALIZED
values.summary: Blend shapes are normalized.

values.name: BLEND_SHAPE_MODE_RELATIVE
values.summary: Blend shapes are relative to base weight.

values.name: PRIMITIVE_LINES
values.summary: Render array as lines (every two vertices a line is created).

values.name: PRIMITIVE_LINE_STRIP
values.summary: Render array as line strip.

values.name: PRIMITIVE_POINTS
values.summary: Render array as points (one vertex equals one point).

values.name: PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES
values.summary: Render array as triangles (every three vertices a triangle is created).

values.name: PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLE_STRIP
values.summary: Render array as triangle strips.

constants.name: PRIMITIVE_POINTS
constants.summary: Render array as points (one vertex equals one point).

constants.name: PRIMITIVE_LINES
constants.summary: Render array as lines (every two vertices a line is created).

constants.name: PRIMITIVE_LINE_STRIP
constants.summary: Render array as line strip.

constants.name: PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES
constants.summary: Render array as triangles (every three vertices a triangle is created).

constants.name: PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLE_STRIP
constants.summary: Render array as triangle strips.

constants.name: ARRAY_VERTEX

constants.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM2
constants.summary: Contains custom color channel 2. [PackedByteArray] if [code](format >> Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM2_SHIFT) & Mesh.ARRAY_FORMAT_CUSTOM_MASK[/code] is [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM], [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RG_HALF], or [constant ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA_HALF]. constants.name: ARRAY_WEIGHTS
constants.summary: [PackedFloat32Array] or [PackedFloat64Array] of bone weights in the range [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code] (inclusive). Contains either 4 or 8 numbers per vertex depending on the presence of the [constant ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS] flag.

constants.name: ARRAY_INDEX
constants.summary: [PackedInt32Array] of integers used as indices referencing vertices, colors, normals, tangents, and textures. All of those arrays must have the same number of elements as the vertex array. No index can be beyond the vertex array size. When this index array is present, it puts the function into "index mode," where the index selects the [i]i[/i]'th vertex, normal, tangent, color, UV, etc. This means if you want to have different normals or colors along an edge, you have to duplicate the vertices. For triangles, the index array is interpreted as triples, referring to the vertices of each triangle. For lines, the index array is in pairs indicating the start and end of each line.

constants.name: ARRAY_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ArrayType] enum.

constants.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_UNORM
constants.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains unsigned normalized byte colors from 0 to 1, encoded as [PackedByteArray].

constants.name: ARRAY_CUSTOM_RGBA8_SNORM

constants.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains half precision float colors, encoded as [PackedByteArray]. Only red and green channels are used.

constants.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains half precision float colors, encoded as [PackedByteArray].

constants.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array]. Only the red channel is used.

constants.summary: Indicates this custom channel contains full float colors, in a [PackedFloat32Array].

constants.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_2D_VERTICES
constants.summary: Flag used to mark that the array contains 2D vertices.

constants.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_DYNAMIC_UPDATE
constants.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh data will use [code]GL_DYNAMIC_DRAW[/code] on GLES. Unused on Vulkan.

constants.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USE_8_BONE_WEIGHTS
constants.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh contains up to 8 bone influences per vertex. This flag indicates that [constant ARRAY_BONES] and [constant ARRAY_WEIGHTS] elements will have double length.

constants.name: ARRAY_FLAG_USES_EMPTY_VERTEX_ARRAY
constants.summary: Flag used to mark that the mesh intentionally contains no vertex array.

constants.name: ARRAY_FLAG_COMPRESS_ATTRIBUTES
constants.summary: Flag used to mark that a mesh is using compressed attributes (vertices, normals, tangents, UVs). When this form of compression is enabled, vertex positions will be packed into an RGBA16UNORM attribute and scaled in the vertex shader. The normal and tangent will be packed into an RG16UNORM representing an axis, and a 16-bit float stored in the A-channel of the vertex. UVs will use 16-bit normalized floats instead of full 32-bit signed floats. When using this compression mode you must use either vertices, normals, and tangents or only vertices. You cannot use normals without tangents. Importers will automatically enable this compression if they can.

constants.name: BLEND_SHAPE_MODE_NORMALIZED
constants.summary: Blend shapes are normalized.

constants.name: BLEND_SHAPE_MODE_RELATIVE
constants.summary: Blend shapes are relative to base weight.
